case_title: ZHU MEI RONG CHENG VS. MONICA FRANCESCA FERRONE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-01-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-01-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT.
